perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man wearing a black beanie and a black-and-white striped long-sleeved shirt stands in the middle of a spacious, modern airport terminal. He holds a green passport and a small document, gesturing with them as he speaks animatedly to the camera. His facial expressions shift from curious to conspiratorial. (2) The scene cuts to the man walking down a brightly lit airport corridor. Luxury brand advertisements are visible on the wall behind him. He looks disgruntled and speaks directly into the camera with a frustrated expression while still clutching his passport.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice speaks in Mandarin and Hokkien with a high-pitched, energetic, and slightly mocking tone. The background is filled with the ambient hum of a busy airport terminal, including distant chatter and mechanical sounds. (2) After a hard cut, the same male voice continues speaking, but the tone becomes more frustrated and aggressive. The ambient noise shifts to the sound of walking in a quieter, echoing hallway.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) "POV：當你以為馬關條約續約" (Hook Text: Humorous premise about the renewal of the Treaty of Shimonoseki). (2) "我現在人在日本關西機場... 現在是12/2" (Functional Text: Establishing location at Kansai Airport and the date). (3) "聽說中共昨天不承認舊金山和約... 所以馬關條約無條件強制續約？" (Functional Text: Explaining the satirical political logic). (4) "我等一下實測過海關... 我就走日本人的通道 看他會不會讓我過？" (Functional Text: Describing the intended experiment). (5) "淦 不行啊" (Decorative Text: Expressing frustration at the failure of the experiment). (6) "習近平唬爛洨" (Decorative Text: Aggressive satirical punchline targeting a political figure).

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator, approximately 2 distant passers-by in the background of the airport terminal.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A male creator in his late 30s wearing a black beanie, a black-and-white striped shirt, and a green crossbody bag.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The first scene is a wide airport terminal with check-in counters, queues, and high ceilings. The second scene is an indoor hallway with Dior advertisements on the wall.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a comedic and satirical vlog where the creator uses a political news rumor as a prompt for a 'social experiment' at an airport. By attempting to use the Japanese citizen channel with a Taiwanese passport under the guise of 'Treaty renewal,' the creator mocks political rhetoric and current events for entertainment.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Brands like Dior and Trip.com appear incidentally as part of the airport environment.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy delivery, use of Hokkien slang, and topical political satire characteristic of Cai Aga.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video relies heavily on the viewer's knowledge of East Asian geopolitical history and current events to understand the humor.
